title: Animation Timelines and Atlas Packing
deviation_notes: Timeline schema gained an optional id (slug) carried into TimelineCompilation; packAtlas requires it as the Phaser load key. The P1 atlas fixture froze key "walk-cycle" without authoring the input field, so TWO_FRAME_TIMELINE gained id: "walk-cycle" (strategy §15 delegated this to downstream roles). TimelineCompiledFrame also carries duration_ms so the atlas can emit durations_ms. The phase1 sentinel evolved per strategy §4.7: tripwire removed in P2, invariants flipped to a post-Green guard in P3, and a 30s testTimeout added in P5 after the child vitest run outgrew the 5s default.
